name: Particle Health
description: Particle Health — Healthcare data network API providing access to longitudinal patient records from 270M US patient records.

seo.title: Particle Health — Compliance Automation
seo.meta_description: Particle Health: Particle Health — Healthcare data network API providing access to longitudinal patient records from 270M US patient records.

when_to_use: Longitudinal patient record API from 270M US patient network
HIPAA-compliant clinical data pull for care management apps
Real-world evidence data access for clinical research platforms
Patient history enrichment for digital health onboarding
Interoperable EHR data retrieval for value-based care programs

pros: Access to longitudinal records from major health networks
Single FHIR API instead of per-provider integrations
Strong fit for care coordination and prior-auth apps
cons: Data availability varies by patient and region
Contractual and legal onboarding is not quick
Recent litigation around Epic access raised uncertainty
Pricing opaque, oriented to enterprise deals
review.verdict: Powerful patient-record reach for digital health, but lock-in and access politics are real risks.
review.best_for: Care coordination, payer, or value-based-care apps needing patient history
review.not_for: Teams needing real-time clinical ordering or lab workflows

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
